mapper.select: SELECT entry_id, category, title, content, status, created_by, reviewed_by, effective_at, created_at, updated_at FROM t_knowledge_entry WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_knowledge_entry (entry_id, category, title, content, status, created_by, reviewed_by, effective_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{entryId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{reviewedBy}, #{effectiveAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM t_knowledge_entry ORDER BY category
